<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Attribute; use Psr\Log\LogLevel; /** * Defines the log level applied to an exception. * * @author Dejan Angelov <angelovdejan@protonmail.com> */ #[\Attribute(\Attribute::TARGET_CLASS)] final class WithLogLevel { /** * @param LogLevel::* $level The level to use to log the exception */ public function __construct(public readonly string $level) { if (!\defined('Psr\Log\LogLevel::'.strtoupper($this->level))) { throw new \InvalidArgumentException(\sprintf('Invalid log level "%s".', $this->level)); } } }
